name: Cinrious
description: Akralval freighter.

name: Kakziar
description: Akralva factory ship. Packed with machinery similarly advanced to its planet-based counterpart, this ship provides the Akralva capability to repair and manufacture equipment on the move. As well as quick relocation of manufacturing capability to provide new colonies similar capabilites to an established planets.

name: Muysikre
description: Akralva planetary mining ship to be quickly deployed on newly captured planet, excavate and process resources for their factory ships and mobile shipyards. This ship also have tracked landing gears for limited mobility.

name: Zikurch
description: Akralva mobile shipyard to provide their vanguards full repair capability and manufacture new ships right behind the frontline to quickly replenish their force.

name: Helgirvas
description: Akralva battleship, the rarest ship among Akralva fleets, its frontal guns will spell doom for who ever stand in its way.

name: Virchan
description: Akralva warship

name: Hixur
description: Akralva entry level warship

name: Qisrkea
description: Ceasrilis light warship.

name: Reayranjr
description: Ceasrilis medium warship.

name: Ansiyral
description: Ceasrilis long range heavy freighter.

name: Dels Sendo
description: The Sendo is a small transport manufactured by Firklee shipyard. It is the smallest and cheapest transport avaliable in this space.

name: Dels Serdeen
description: Mid-sized mid-ranged transport manufactured by Firklee shipyard for general transit across Dels space.

name: Dels Doreenor
description: High speed long range transport commonly used for long range transit as well as the upper classes for business and vacation alike.

name: Dels Desen
description: A direct descendant to Irbor Sefora shipyard's older frighter than were used since the early days of Dels interstellar exploration using the design of detachable rounded cargo pods on the side allowing transportation of cargo over short distance without lifting vehicle which most early spaceport lacks. This design became less important in modern days where most spaceports were well equipped resulting in decreased popularity of the ship among the more experienced captains.

name: Dels Donson
description: These are more recent freighter built by Puda Der shipyard. Though it can carry slightly less than the older Irbor Sefora's Desen the Donson offers greater toughness, speed, maneuverbility, and range to compensate and keep up with modern requirement as the Ufulre becomes more of a problem and new colonies are further away.

name: Dels Manoon
description: Irbor Sefora's Manoon was released shortly after the Desen as long ranged alternative to promote the expansion of Dels territory and encourage growth in those further colonies.

name: Dels Eudaion
description: As Dels colony expands further, Eudaion was released to satisfy the need for long range freighter.

name: Dels Melduklar
description: A newer design of Dels fuel tanker ship to supply convoys for long distance travels. Often used as alternative to long range freighters allow each freighter to dedicate more space for cargo. The Melduklar also comes with fighter bay for fuel-carrying fighters to assist in refuelling the fleet. The ship is also got built-in ramscoop to continuiously refill its fuel along the way.

name: Dels Desin
description: Light and fast interceptor made by Firklee as cheap, entry level combat ship for those that prefers riskier life or occasionally fielded by Dardornai as reconaissance ship as well as serving as additional escort in a pinch. Though the ship is one of the most fragile in the area, its' Type-F hyperdrive allows it to quickly escape in battles it can't win.

name: Dels Derso
description: Derkeela's heavier alternative to Firklee Desin. Though less agile, in exchange the Derso is equipped with heavier armament and shieldingy and rely on it to eliminate their enemies before they do so to them. It saw some success but most ended up in the hands of the Ufulre who often have to deal with the heavily armed Kaote patrols. While Dardornai commander have expressed interest in the ship the logistic remains a major problem as the most of Derkeela shipyard is located very far from Dardornai territory.

name: Dels Ekdor
description: Irbor Sefora attempts at interceptor turns out to be borderline light escort trading most of its agility for armour, shielding, and armaments. Ekdor is largely favored by the merchants for their larger fuel tank that allow them to keep up more with the long ranged freighters.

name: Dels Secsen
description: Puda Der shipyard Secsen is the mainstay of the Kaote patrols for many years, only not too long ago it was considered outdated enough some surplus were sold on the civilian market. Though, despite the age and dated design many Secsen remains in service of the Kaote navy.

name: Dels Senro
description: An attack craft designed to bombard and destroy larger warships with big guns. Largely preferred by the Dardornai navy who have to constantly deal with hostile alien and their seemingly limitless supply of large warships.

name: Dels Deeris
description: Heavily armed attack craft designed and manufactured by Leeris Nai Shipworks specifically targeting Dardornai commanders who prefer ships with heavy firepower but carry less logistic burden of shell-using weapons.

name: Dels Senvari
description: High speed warship that is less of a warship and more of a .

name: Dels Uldeor
description: A more recent frigate commissioned by Prada Kaote to be used as their new long range patrol ship and replace the aging Secsen.

name: Dels Darca
description: Primary carrier deployed by Prada Kaote and one of the largest warship used by Dels. It is designed to fight in a fleet along with other warships and deploy drones and figthers as distraction and additional firepower.

name: Dels Decso
description: Built by Puda Der shipyard for Kaote and Dardornai Navy as response to raising threat from the newly formed Ufulre after contact with Ignaggen. Though most Dels believe the real reason is to provide Kaote and Dardornai anti-capital capability incase of Ignaggen hostility, though only a few of Decso class have been found in service of the Dardornai.

name: Dels Dacar
description: One of the few Irbor Sefora's warship design. It lacks the distinct cargo pods found in other freighters of the same shipyard as the Dacar is intended to be used as heavily armed freighter capable of defending it self in an event of an attack.

name: Dels Caodauri
description: Dels Dardornai warship designed to fight against the Kroom invaders due to low supply of Decso from the Kaote, the new ship is designed to be manufactured within Dardornai space. Due to lack of advanced facilities and experience it was made from multiple smaller parts instead of a single large cast. While not as mass-efficient as using fewer larger parts it allows faster replacement of damaged parts than repairing damages, which can be critical in combat-intensive area the Dardornai guards. Unlike the Decso, Dardornai Caodauri have shorter operational range in exchange for armour and other systems as their territory is far smaller than that of the Kaote.

name: Dels Dee
description: Dels Anti-Missile drone designed to guard their ships from hostile missile.

name: Dels Dea
description: Dels attack drone designed to swarm the enemy and serve as distraction for the mothership and the rest of the fleet.

name: Donko Sao
description: Pride of the Donko's engineers, this is currently their most advanced spaceship ever built.

name: Donko Kanse
description: Kanse are primarily used for reconnaissance and mining.

name: Donko Koi
description: Koi is a Donko fighter carrier.

name: Donko Senka
description: Before the development of Sao, this ship were the vanguard of Donko's force filling the role of multipurpose cruiser.

name: Genterrac
description: A compact transport ship built by Erader Darua.

name: Dauren
description: Erader Freighter maufactured by Darua.

name: Raular
description: A small and cheap freighter found used by all Erader fractions.

name: Kelranter
description: A small ship made by Erader Darua for asteroid mining. While classified as interceptor it is mostly a freighter.

name: Kemvanh
description: Darua Republic Warship

name: Kyseruna
description: Kasiva Empire heavy freighter.

name: Aikiyu
description: Kasiva Fighter/Interceptor

name: Eishen
description: Kasiva Empire Warship

name: Nukrau
description: Narpul fighter developed in the early days shortly before the Kroom invasion.

name: Kunshera
description: Narpul Transport.

name: Azelpur
description: Makerurader Interceptor, rarely deployed in battle fleets, it is most commonly found behind the frontline mining asteroids.

name: Sorgeldaz
description: Makerurader Freighter, which isn't that far from being a warship itself.

name: Ertezkaral
description: Makerurader Warship

name: Vardarkin
description: Makerurader cruiser.

name: Roekler
description: The main battleship of the Erm war fleet.

name: Hidersan
description: Large freighter used by Erm.

name: Hordanler
description: A Longrange weapon platform made by Erm, they mostly stay behind stronger ships and attack from range with their deadly artillery and missiles.

name: Ernar
description: Ernar is a light warship built by Erm to mainly to support large ships by applying various of distruption on the enemy ship and take their shields down.

name: Eaken
description: Erm Patrol Interceptor

name: Eirae
description: Erm smallest freighter.

name: Akyonur
description: Gargoor'an escort.

name: Bwehoke
description: Gargoor'an warship.

name: Axchriv
description: Gargoor'an heavily armoured carrier.

name: Iurenoa
description: Gargoor'an fighter/bomber.

name: Xuokuen
description: Gargoor'an moon cracker.

name: Hailika
description: Small Geeva transport, commonly found every where in Geeva space.

name: Haisihril
description: Geeva luxury transport.

name: Vanli
description: Small Geeva personal transport. Used by some Geeva individuals to travel across space quickly.

name: Kinika
description: Geeva escort ship developed shortly after the evacuation for light escort role to deal with occasional Kroom raid. It comes with large number of ports for the its size allowing it to be equipped in various way for whatever task the Geeva require.

name: Kimali
description: Geeva Heavy Warship.

name: Kuiseire
description: Geeva Heavy Freighter, lightly armed and most would operate deep within Geeva territory. Often relying heavily on escorts if they have to fight.

name: Mayuinia
description: Ancient Geeva warship used in their early day of space exploration. Extremely durable and mostly used as rear guard against the advancing Kroom force. It was rumored that the ship was built with alien technologies not even the Geeva themselves understand. Though it is possible for them to recreate, it will be a monumental project.

name: HD-8426 Tarallion
description: A powerful warship obviously not made by the Geeva. Only one is kept in secret at the heart of the Geeva capital, only to be used in the most dire time.

name: I'nos
description: I'nos is the spearhead of the Ignaggen when exploring into new area. At least two dozens of them would be present in the expedition fleet when venturing into new systems maintaining security and safety of the rest of the fleet. Since its introduction several millenia ago it had recived multiple upgrade to keep up with its neighbouring forces.

name: Loerlen
description: While combat is extremely rare within Ignaggen space, same couldn't be said for its neighbours, Loerlen is a recent design to provide an affordable escort for Ignaggen merchants who travels outside of Ignaggen territory.

name: Keorlen
description: Keorlen is designed and built to replace older frighters which are much more difficult to manufacture, as agility and cost effectiveness of these freighters are much more preferred for Ignaggen which rarely face any combat, older freighters have been completely phased out of the Ignaggen merchant fleets.

name: Kina
description: A cheaper, more modern clone of Kamuel. While not as durable as Kamuel it is much faster.

name: Gikeor
description: A new interceptor design utilized by Ignaggens as astroid miners. While some consider it to be more fragile than the Koggareu, its improved shielding technologies compensated for the less durable hull.

name: Koggareu
description: These ships are one of the earliest Ignaggen ship to be equipped with a hyperdrive system. Serving as the scouts for the Ignaggens and were the first to jump among the stars to gather information and warn the rest of any threat.

name: Kamuel
description: This is one of the older ship design by Ignaggen many centuries ago. Despite that, every thing from manufacturing to its function seems like magic, it looks rather crude compared to modern technologies yet works as well or even better in some aspect.

name: Sharnhi Bvragun
description: A formidable battlestation of the long long past developed and fielded by an ancient alliance. Until today several can still be found still guarding their location.

name: Grokva
description: Kroom Kakaima cruiser with a small squadron of support fighters used for many role across the Kakaima Navy.

name: Girok
description: Kroom fighter used primarily for chasing down interceptors and provide distraction.

name: Grakka
description: Kroom general purpose frigate developed in their earlier age of spaceflight as cheap patrol vessel.

name: Gikaar
description: Kroom standard freighter for shipping everything from industrial supplies to arms and ammo for the frontline.

name: Mukikor
description: Kroom heavy freighter as more secure mean to deliver supplies or transporting materials in bulk.

name: Garokka
description: Rather recent Kroom light weapon platform developed to deliver the most firepower in cheapest ship. Mostly meant to deal with new enemies like the Dels and Eraders

name: Kargorko
description: Crude and basic fighter used by the Kroom Kanai, the hulls are barely held together by some bolts and welds. This thing will probably be torn apart upon getting hit.

name: Kaargor
description: A large yet fragile transport cobbled together from scraps and cheap materials, it's quite a miracle this thing can even fly at all. The bunks were extremely packed and uncomfortable leaving barely any room even for breathing and clealy not meant for any long range transport. While the Kanai may not seems to have much use for fragile troop transport without even a decent escort, these were more often used for boarding disabled Kakaima ships.

name: Mugildor
description: Kroom Kanai warship heavily modified from the Mukikor as their only ship capable of holding up a fight against a Kakaima cruiser though often still outgunned due to lack of small and medium escorts compared to the Kakaima navy. With far less industrial capability than the Kakaima there were often too few of these to be effective.

name: Kasoulek
description: A small Kumakk fighter for asteroid mining, often as training for young pilots or recreation rather than required as a job.

name: Oulkorke
description: Kumakk automated freighter.

name: Akolucor
description: Kumakk primary guard warship. Also commonly used as mobile laboratory and science vessel due to their space and protection.

name: Kolo'akir
description: Kumakk defensive satellite or fighting the Akralva

name: Ar Da Sam
description: One of the smallest Nuru ship mostly used as light transport vehicle or personal vehicle.

name: Wi Wai Si
description: This is a Nuru science vessel with lots of built-in sensors and other alien scientific instruments for field analysis.

name: Ar Pu Haa
description: Unlike regular spaceship, Nuru ships lacks of any identifiable weapon yet it is capable of damaging hostile ships.

name: Ca Mok Si
description: The technology possess by the Nuru are vary far advanced enough to allow regular citizen with knowledge to design and create their own ship on a whim. Tough, this ship is an example of a few that is mass produced and sold. Generally there is not much reason for one to design their own ship. [Author note: This description is an oversimplification and may change as time goes.]

name: Qoro(M) Manta
description: These are the smallest ship used by the Northern Qoro, they are usually kept for asteroid mining and were rarely deployed in the frontline being the weakest ship. Makau a Qoro ships are designed and optimised for very though shielding. Works best with their own shield generators. These ships also have a tiny built-in shield generator.

name: Qoro(M) Matoanan
description: Ancient Qoro worldship

name: Qoro(S) Ganoth
description: A heavier version of Gosat.

name: Qoro(S) Elgarel
description: A small light warship that can carry a fighter with it into battle. Also used as freighter and recovery ship.

name: Qoro(S) Gasat
description: These are cheap fighters to be deployed en masse and overwhelm the enemy in combat.

name: Qoro(S) Logr
description: Eastern Qoro Cargo pods. It is equipped with basic reaction wheels and RCS for fine tuning when docking in space.

name: Termat
description: The largest freighter built by the Resmakia Alliance, far superior to Syndicates Bulk Freighter in both cargo capacity, defense and speed.

name: Tarrel
description: One of the most common freighter used by the Resmakia Alliance far before the war start, most stat are similar to the Syndicates Freighter but Tarrel is much lighter and more capacity but smaller fuel tank. The current stock variant uses a Erm's anti-fighter turret as the only offensive turret allows it to withstand a small fleet of interceptors of same tiers.

name: Revos Homan
description: Common interceptor used by Revos for personal transport and other general usage.

name: Revos Rova
description: Automated interceptor used by Revos often for escort. They can also be deployed in large number in response to a threat.

name: Revos Mokla
description: Revos Warship sometimes found in a patrol, usually deployed only when needed.

name: Revos Caosma
description: Revos Cargo ship.

name: Taroun Ulkoura
description: Taroun autonomous freighter.

name: Taroun Eroun
description: Mostly a bigger version of Oresu

name: Taroun Oresu
description: Taroun light warship, usually found in patrol and scout fleets. While armed, these ships are not meant for combat.

name: Tehru Avir
description: Escort drone used by Tehru Insker.

name: Tehru Mavuin
description: Carrier used by Tehru Insker.

name: Tehru Piv
description: Small Drone used by Tehru Insker.

name: Tehru Tcvarka
description: The primary Warship of Tehru Insker.

name: Tehru Vurbck
description: Common freighter used by both Tehru fraction.

name: Tehru Iinsir
description: The primary Warship of Tehru Miitr.

name: SSm10
description: SSm10 Turret representation of a planet-based gun

name: Ultaka Vyvis
description: Exotic Ultaka warship widely believed to be just a myth, or rather most who saw it never returns.

name: Uoorn Warrior
description: Uoorn Warrior is a defensive warship deployed by the Uoorn to guard their planets.

name: Uoorn Aggressor
description: Uoorn raid ship used in swarm.

name: Telsarator
description: Telsarators are interceptor used by the Wallagi for patrolling, surveillance, scouting and escorting other warships.

name: Dettalor
description: Dettalors are a recent medium warship design to replace their light warships.

name: Talselar
description: Wallagi fighter for chasing faster ships.

name: Sentasor
description: Large Wallagi patrol ship

name: Chonasi
description: Wallagi cargo ship built for shipping vast amount of cargo across vast distance. Though it's lightly armed and unsuited for lightly patrolled area.

name: Mecohni
description: A gigantic mobile base built by Wallagi to serve as frontline base for their expeditions. This ship contains everything required to sustain operations for millenia if required with sections dedicated to everything from food production to production of general goods and shipyards to repair and build new ships.

name: VK-35 Katen
description: Ancient fighter designed by Zis that are no longer in production. Once the mainstay of the Zis Navy both for interception and delivering heavy payload. Now it is mostly found in non-combat roles far behind the battlefield and occasionally deployed to combat weaker enemies.

name: RZ-28 Forlan
description: [A] A more recent interceptor design. Though not widely adopted by the Navy but rather by officers as personal transport ship.

name: RZ-621-02 Razor
description: A light patrol vessel also a used for transport and cargo. These are extremely old design and each of these in service for longer than many civilizations past and present. Aside some refit, these ships are mostly the same as when they're fresh out of the factory.

name: AD-04 Craxa
description: The Zis version of a cargo container with engines and a cockpit bolted on to it. A low-grade light freighter built to transport small amount of things quickly. Though very unpopular due to being relatively vulerable in combat and were eclipsed by its automated variant.

name: AD-04A Craxa-A
description: Automated variant of AD-04 Craxa. Vastly more commonly used than its piloted version for shipping various things across safer area and common lane.

name: SY-8662 Sysor
description: Originally classified as warship with sizable cargo designed for planetary deployment and resupply or alternatively carry enough additional ordance to glass planets if ever required. Eons has past and it is now merely a rear-line freighter to the Zis Navy. Nonetheless it'll still rip apart most ship in the galaxy with ease.

name: DT-510 Quadlancer
description: [A] A relatively recent experimental attack craft with high mobility and enough firepower to cripple even larger ships and additional capacity for upgrades.

name: DT-224 Trazar
description: [A] Trazar is a anti-fighter light warship equipped with 4 up-sized shotguns.

name: ZM-5422 Karloz
description: [N] A more recent cruiser for anti-captial role.

name: AD-672 Ranzai
description: [N] A small patrol boat.

name: BX-3826 Kazai
description: [N] Anti-captial warship.

name: ZC-4226 Zaikul
description: [N] Zis carrier

name: AS-56 Virsiz
description: [A] A small transport earlist of Airsai-series ships, often used as light troop landing ship.

name: AD-860A Aorlan
description: An ancient drone design.

name: ZN-7681 Eaxes
description: [A] A more recent battlecarrier design.

name: SZ-6889 Ronez
description: [] Archaic carrier once used by ZIS Navy. Once hailed for the success in its early days. Though a carrier it is well-armed enough to handle most threat by itself as per standard of the time as these vessels will often find itself operating alone for various reasons.

name: Balzita
description: [C] Zis prototype bio-cannonship.

name: DT-66 Traz
description: [A] 3rd generation fighter/bomber from Trivis Shipyards

name: Zorcn Dermue
description: Dermue is a Zorcn combat drone armed with a rocket pod which allows it to dump more damage into their enemy before being destroyed making it notably more effective than the republic combat drones which uses laser and is more fragile.

name: Zorcn Augyr
description: The Zorcn Augyr designed at the final phase of the recent civil war, with the war ended and peace spreading out through the Zorcn a few months after the introduction of the ship, it is already phasing out due to lack of need.

name: Zorcn Mausr
description: Neyton Co. Shipyards Mausr is very lightly armed designed as light escort or for astroid mining. Unlike the standard Zorcn ship with not much focus on the shielding, Neyton shipyards attempted to increase the strengthen of their shielding technology but due to lack of prior development of shielding technology their shielding remains rudimentary.

name: Zorcn Mausr Lite
description: In an effort to expand their spaceship market, Neyton Co. released the Mausr Lite as a cheaper, downgraded version of their interceptor that can be upgraded later when their owner can afford. [upgrade capacity: 5] (Can install 5 upgrades)

name: Zorcn Eytis
description: Despite the militaristic nature of the Zorcn ship designs, even their most basic transport is considered to be more luxurious than transport of many others.

name: Zorcn Bytis
description: "Why a slow dedicated freighter when you can just strip off the bunks and puts the crates there?", A surprisingly simple conversion of transport into a freighter.

name: Zorcn Enntr
description: This is an equivalent of luxury yatch for the Zorcn.

name: Zorcn Bermas
description: Bermas is a common freighter model. From the repair marks found on some of these ships indicates many years of service behind it, even then, it is still a solid and reliable ship.

name: Zorcn Barsten
description: Zorcn Barsten was first deployed during the Zorcn civil war 2 centuries ago, the first series of Barsten where converted directly from Bermas freighter. Now most where built from the shipyard sharing the same parts with Bermas.

name: Zorcn Nuar'an
description: Neyton Co. shipyard attempt at imitating Nuru ships. Nothing but general shape of the ship came close to what it's suppose to imitate and does make quite a poor ship for everything.

name: Zorcn Emaryt
description: The Emaryt is a large transport for moving large amount of people across the space,.

name: Zorcn Mtyr
description: A fast and heavily armed alternative to the standard Bitorn in exchange for less cargo space.

name: Zorcn Bitorn
description: Bitorn is the Zorcn equivalent to Syndicate Bulk Freighter, heavier yet faster thanks to it's larger engine capacity.

name: Zorcn Itrras
description: Itrras is one of the oldest Zorcn ship remaining in service, mostly used as military freighter for transporting military secrets. Despite the design being a few centuries old, its armor is still very durable.

name: Zorcn Genex
description: The Genex was built as anti-fighter cruiser armed with Ronc missile turrets as its main armament along with Huer anti-missiles. The large amount of anti-missiles on this ship made allows it to easily shoot down a whole barrage of missiles. While their shield depleted rather quickly compared to the Navy Carrier, it was made up with superior armor technology that allows it endure more damage.
